mentions.note: Korean memory giant with hidden supply capacity history; could surprise market if flooding supply; wildcard risk to memory stock momentum.
Korean memory giant with hidden supply; Cramer blindsided by competitor supply in past cycles; could crash memory market if unleashed.
Parabolic 350% gain in 12mo but -16% in 5 days, -10% overnight; represents >50% of Cospi index with Samsung; correction worst in ages—volatility signal, wait for stabilization.
High-bandwidth memory chip supplier with $35.5B quarterly revenue; real business with $1T market cap not overvalued versus speculative alternatives.
Cheap if the data center trade holds, but a $29B raise with no retail appeal would force institutions to sell other stocks to fund it.

Dominates HBM market (56% share); revenue tripled, earnings swung to $30B profit (2024) and $153B projected (2026); trades at 7x earnings despite strength; supply-demand tight through 2027-28. Put on medium position, leave room to buy weakness; volatility expected from $26.4B IPO.
Korean semiconductor raised $26.5B in US markets; up $41 today but trades 4x next year's earnings—ridiculously cheap on constrained supply, pricing power.
Memory chip company; if borrowing money to buy, you're part of margin plague; faster we purge these leveraged buyers, healthier market becomes.
